title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - Talisma Unveils Revolutionary AI Platform for Financial Services and Education
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.

title: Sensex to Climb 95,000? - New Bull Market Taking Shape
description: The Indian Stock Market is anticipated to rise significantly, with Morgan Stanley projecting the Sensex to reach 95,000 by December 2026. This forecast indicates a potential gain of 22% from its recent close. The report highlights a developing bull market following a challenging performance period for Indian equities. While a bull scenario could push the index to 107,000, a bear scenario may see it drop to 76,000. Factors influencing these outcomes include oil prices, monetary policies, and global economic conditions, along with concerns regarding India's position in artificial intelligence., Markets, Times Now
content: The Indian Stock Market is likely to see a massive uptick as the Sensex is projected to climb to 95,000 by December 2026. Morgan Stanley said a new bull market is taking shape after one of the worst relative performance phases for Indian equities in ... [1659 chars]

title: Amazon cloud unit's AI revenue run rate exceeds $15 billion, CEO says
description: Amazon.com said on Thursday its cloud business's AI revenue run rate was more than $15 billion in the ​first quarter of 2026, the company's first disclosure of ‌direct financial returns from its artificial intelligence efforts.
content:
The numbers are also "ascending rapidly", Amazon CEO Andy Jassy said in a letter to shareholders, adding that its ​cloud business as a whole would be growing even ​faster without the capacity constraints that the tech industry ⁠is currently facing.

title: Reskilling, education reforms needed to harness AI potential: K V Kamath
description: NEW DELHI, Apr 9:  Veteran banker K V Kamath on Thursday underlined the need for reskilling and education reforms to harness the potential of artificial intelligence (AI), which will be defining the theme of the next decade. title: Pentagon's ouster of Anthropic opens doors for small AI rivals
description: Small defense industry artificial intelligence startups are suddenly fielding calls from generals, combatant commanders and deep-pocketed investors, after the souring relationship between the Pentagon and its ​once-favored AI vendor, Anthropic, reinforced the need to diversify and increase the number of AI providers for the military.

title: Mohanlal detours to polling booth before US flight, earns praise from UDF candidate Sabarinathan
